text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
212 
PRSCRBNG_PRVDR_NPI 
LABEL: 
Prescribing Provider NPI 
DESCRIPTION: The National Provider ID (NPI) of the provider who prescribed a medication to a patient. 
SHORT NAME: PRSCRBNG_PRVDR_NPI 
LONG NAME: PRSCRBNG_PRVDR_NPI 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
10 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
RX header 
VALUES: 
Valid characters include only numbers (0–9)
